entry.title: 'chenge-first-blog'
entry.content: stostostoorzorzorz

entry.title: text-latex
entry.content:
\(E=mc^2\)

\[ F(X)=1 \\\\ K(x)=\sqrt{x} \] \[ \begin{align} E(S^2) &=E\left(\frac{1}{n} \sum_{i=1}^n (X_i-\bar{X})^2\right) \\ & =E\left(\frac{1}{n}\sum_{i=1}^n X_i^2\right) - E\left(\frac{1}{n}\sum_{i=1}^n 2\bar{X}X_i\right) + E\left(\frac{1}{n}\sum_{i=1}^n \bar{X}^2\right) \\ & =EX^2 -E(\bar{X}^2) \\ & =DX + (EX)^2 - D\bar{X} - (E\bar{X})^2 \\ & =\frac{n-1}{n}DX \end{align} \]
